title: [lichen_l2.c:381] lichen_peer_add missing array size validation
description: Function: lichen_peer_add. Contract violation: The function signature uses const uint8_t eui64[8] and const uint8_t pubkey[32], but array parameters decay to pointers in C - there is no compile-time validation that callers pass arrays of the correct size. The runtime NULL checks are present but cannot detect undersized buffers. Consider using static analysis attributes (__attribute__((nonnull))) or documenting the size requirement prominently. Priority 3 because buffer sizes are correct at all current call sites.
close_reason: Fixed: Added BUILD_ASSERTs to verify API array sizes (eui64[8], pubkey[32]) match internal constants (LICHEN_EUI64_LEN, LICHEN_L2_PUBKEY_LEN). Enhanced header documentation to explicitly warn that C arrays decay to pointers with no runtime size check, and callers must pass exactly-sized buffers.
